page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.large is a general-purpose virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features a dedicated Intel Xeon 8369HB processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The instance is configured with 2 physical cores and 2 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz, supported by 8.0 GB of system memory, which equates to 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Cache specifications include 32 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 33 MB of L3 cache. The CPU supports advanced instruction sets including AVX, AVX512F, AVX512_VNNI, and AVX512_BF16. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.g7ne.large demonstrates moderate single-core performance but limited multi-core scaling. The stress-ng single-core CPU test yields a score of 1572.49, placing it in the average tier, while the multi-core CPU performance score of 2070.9 falls into the bottom 10% tier. Memory bandwidth is also constrained, with read-only small block cached bandwidth measured at 116.01 GB/sec and large block uncached read bandwidth at 16.29 GB/sec, both ranking in the bottom 10%. Single-threaded compression and decompression tasks perform relatively better, with gzip compression reaching 27.19 GB/sec and bzip3 decompression achieving 10.47 GB/sec, both representing average tier performance.

The primary tradeoff of the ecs.g7ne.large is its low multi-core and database performance, as evidenced by a Passmark database operations score of 820.1 and a Redis SET throughput of 2.02 million operations per second, both of which rank in the bottom 10%. Consequently, this instance is not suited for high-throughput database systems or intensive multi-threaded applications. However, its dedicated CPU allocation and 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offer a stable, cost-effective environment for lightweight, single-threaded workloads, basic web serving, and development or testing environments that do not require high memory bandwidth or local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.large is a general-purpose virtual server instance featuring a dedicated Intel Xeon 8369HB processor with 2 vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the x86_64 architecture at 3.3 GHz, this KVM-based instance includes advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Performance benchmarks indicate average single-core capabilities, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1572.49 and solid single-threaded compression speeds. However, multi-core performance and memory bandwidth are limited, as shown by a multi-core stress-ng score of 2070.9 and a Passmark database score of 820.1. This resource profile makes the instance a cost-effective option for low-intensity, single-threaded applications, basic web serving, and lightweight development environments rather than demanding database or parallel processing workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.large is a general-purpose instance with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, suitable for lightweight single-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.large is a general-purpose KVM instance with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated dual-core virtual server with a balanced memory ratio, optimized for lightweight single-threaded tasks and basic web serving.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 8369HB processor with 2 vCPUs and 2 physical cores
8.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
Supports AVX-512 vector and vector neural network instructions
Baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps with no local storage included
Best suited for lightweight single-threaded applications and development environments
